name: Oficina SOAT - Microsservicos Lab
description: Dashboard operacional dos microsservicos da plataforma Oficina SOAT no ambiente lab. Substitua accountIds [0] pelo ID da conta New Relic antes de importar.

pages.name: Operacional
pages.description: Golden signals, logs, traces e sinais Kubernetes dos tres microsservicos.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Oficina SOAT - Microsservicos Lab

Antes de importar, substitua todas as ocorrencias de `"accountIds": [0]` pelo ID numerico da sua conta New Relic.

Filtros canonicos para spans, logs e metricas dos microsservicos:

- `service.namespace = 'oficina'`
- `deployment.environment = 'lab'`
- `service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service')`

As metricas coletadas pelo New Relic OpenTelemetry Collector devem aparecer em `Metric`, com `k8s.cluster.name = 'eks-lab'` para sinais Kubernetes e os filtros canonicos acima para `/q/metrics` dos microsservicos.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Span SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'rpm' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') FACET service.name TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Taxa de falhas HTTP por servico

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(`http.status`) >= 400) AS 'falhas HTTP %' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND `http.status` IS NOT NULL FACET service.name

widgets.title: Latencia p50, p95 e p99 por servico

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Span SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 50, 95, 99) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') FACET service.name TIMESERIES

FROM Span SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') FACET service.name, http.response.status_code LIMIT 50

FROM Span SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 95) AS 'p95 ms', count(*) AS 'amostras' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') FACET service.name, http.route LIMIT 25

FROM Span SELECT latest(trace.id) AS 'traceId', latest(http.route) AS 'rota', latest(http.response.status_code) AS 'status', latest(duration.ms) AS 'duracao ms' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND (error IS true OR otel.status_code = 'ERROR' OR http.response.status_code >= 500 OR http.status_code >= 500) FACET service.name LIMIT 50

FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET service.name, level TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Falhas HTTP e logs de erro recentes

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'quando', latest(message) AS 'mensagem', latest(correlationId) AS 'correlationId', latest(traceId) AS 'traceId', latest(`http.status`) AS 'status', latest(`http.path`) AS 'rota' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND ((`http.status` IS NOT NULL AND numeric(`http.status`) >= 400) OR level = 'ERROR' OR level = 'FATAL' OR message LIKE '%Exception%') FACET service.name LIMIT 50

FROM Metric SELECT average(`container.cpu.usage`) AS 'CPU cores', average(`k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization`) * 100 AS 'CPU limite %' WHERE `k8s.cluster.name` = 'eks-lab' AND `k8s.namespace.name` = 'default' AND `k8s.deployment.name` IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET `k8s.deployment.name` TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT average(`container.memory.usage`) / 1024 / 1024 AS 'memoria MiB', average(`k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization`) * 100 AS 'memoria limite %' WHERE `k8s.cluster.name` = 'eks-lab' AND `k8s.namespace.name` = 'default' AND `k8s.deployment.name` IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET `k8s.deployment.name` TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT max(`kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total`) AS 'restarts' WHERE `k8s.cluster.name` = 'eks-lab' AND `k8s.namespace.name` = 'default' AND `k8s.deployment.name` IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET `k8s.deployment.name` TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT latest(`kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready`) AS 'ready replicas', latest(`kube_deployment_status_replicas_available`) AS 'available replicas', latest(`kube_deployment_spec_replicas`) AS 'desired replicas' WHERE `k8s.cluster.name` = 'eks-lab' AND `k8s.namespace.name` = 'default' AND `k8s.deployment.name` IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET `k8s.deployment.name` LIMIT 20

FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'ultimo log', latest(message) AS 'mensagem', latest(traceId) AS 'traceId', count(*) AS 'linhas' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') AND correlationId IS NOT NULL FACET correlationId, service.name LIMIT 50

FROM Metric SELECT latest(process_uptime_seconds) AS 'uptime s', latest(jvm_threads_live_threads) AS 'threads JVM', latest(http_server_active_requests) AS 'requests ativos' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND service.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET service.name LIMIT 50
